text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass and modernity evoke a sterile blankness—yet the gallery’s inside glow tempts me. I cross the threshold and feel an experimental energy, as if I have been invited into a playground for thoughts. The R+D display, bold and analytical, makes me ponder the boundaries between creation and observation. There is a strange comfort here: confusion, purpose, playfulness all coexisting. My mind is alert, searching for meaning, aware that understanding might come only later—if at all. I feel like a question in search of its own answer.
